hooks.command: node -e "const input=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const d=JSON.parse(input);const cmd=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.command)||'';if(/--no-verify/.test(cmd)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'--no-verify is not allowed. Fix the pre-commit/commit-msg/pre-push hook failure instead of bypassing it.'}));process.exit(0);}process.stdout.write(input);}catch(e){process.stdout.write(input);}"

PreToolUse.description: Block --no-verify to protect pre-commit, commit-msg, and pre-push hooks from being bypassed

hooks.command: node -e "const input=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const d=JSON.parse(input);const path=(d.tool_input&&(d.tool_input.file_path||d.tool_input.path))||'';const configs=['.eslintrc','.eslintrc.js','.eslintrc.json','.eslintrc.cjs','.prettierrc','.prettierrc.js','.prettierrc.json','biome.json','biome.config.ts','.stylelintrc'];const isConfig=configs.some(c=>path.endsWith(c)||path.includes('/'+c));if(isConfig){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Modifying linter/formatter config is not allowed. Fix the code to comply with the existing rules instead of weakening the config.'}));process.exit(0);}process.stdout.write(input);}catch(e){process.stdout.write(input);}"

PreToolUse.description: Block modifications to linter/formatter config files — fix the code, not the config

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx files with Prettier after edits

hooks.command: node -e "const input=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const d=JSON.parse(input);const path=(d.tool_input&&(d.tool_input.file_path||d.tool_input.path))||'';if(/\.tsx?$/.test(path)){const fs=require('fs');const content=fs.existsSync(path)?fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8'):'';const matches=content.match(/console\.log/g);if(matches&&matches.length>0){process.stderr.write('[console.log] WARNING: '+matches.length+' console.log statement(s) found in '+path+'. Remove before shipping.\n');}}process.stdout.write(input);}catch(e){process.stdout.write(input);}"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log statements in .ts/.tsx files after edits

hooks.command:
node -e "const input=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const d=JSON.parse(input);const summary=d.summary||d.transcript_path||'(no summary)';const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dir=path.join(process.env.HOME||process.env.USERPROFILE||'.','claude-sessions');if(!fs.existsSync(dir))fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});const file=path.join(dir,'pre-compact-'+Date.now()+'.txt');fs.writeFileSync(file,'Compacted at: '+new Date().toISOString()+'
Summary: '+summary+'
');process.stderr.write('[pre-compact] State saved to '+file+'
');}catch(e){}process.stdout.write(input);"

PreCompact.description: Log a marker before context compaction so session state can be recovered
